Title: User logs in successfully with valid credentials
Preconditions: User has registered and obtained a valid token
Test Data:
- email: test@example.com
- password: securepassword123
- token: valid_token
Test Steps:
1. Main requests token from LocalUser
2. LocalUser requests user data from API_Manager using the token
3. API_Manager returns a new LocalUser object to LocalUser
4. LocalUser returns status "OK" to Main
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully, and a new LocalUser object is created

Title: User logs in unsuccessfully with invalid token
Preconditions: User has registered but token is invalid
Test Data:
- email: test@example.com
- password: securepassword123
- token: invalid_token
Test Steps:
1. Main requests token from LocalUser
2. LocalUser requests user data from API_Manager using the token
3. API_Manager returns status "NOT_OK" to LocalUser
4. LocalUser returns status "NOT_OK" to Main
Expected Result: User is not logged in, and an error message is displayed

Title: Retrieve list of data successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the requested data
Test Steps:
1. Main requests listJSON from API_Manager
2. API_Manager passes request to Service/Need/Report
3. Service/Need/Report processes the request and returns results to API_Manager
4. API_Manager returns results to Main
5. Main displays the list
Expected Result: List of data is retrieved and displayed successfully

Title: Retrieve list of data with empty JSON response
Preconditions: User is logged in but no data is available
Test Steps:
1. Main requests listJSON from API_Manager
2. API_Manager passes request to Service/Need/Report
3. Service/Need/Report processes the request and returns an empty list to API_Manager
4. API_Manager returns an empty list to Main
5. Main displays an empty list
Expected Result: Empty list is displayed indicating no data available

Title: Create a new entry successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to create new entries
Test Data: - newEntry: {"title": "New Entry", "description": "This is a new entry"}
Test Steps:
1. Main requests to create a new entry via API_Manager
2. API_Manager transforms the new entry into JSON format
3. API_Manager passes the new entry data to Service/Need/Report
4. Service/Need/Report processes the request and sends confirmation back to API_Manager
5. API_Manager informs Main that the process is complete
Expected Result: New entry is created successfully, and Main receives confirmation

Title: Fail to create a new entry due to invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in but provided invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Main requests to create a new entry via API_Manager
2. API_Manager transforms the new entry into JSON format
3. API_Manager passes the new entry data to Service/Need/Report
4. Service/Need/Report detects invalid data and sends an error back to API_Manager
5. API_Manager informs Main of the failure
Expected Result: Entry creation fails, and Main receives an error message

Title: Update data successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to update data
Test Steps:
1. Main requests to print data to screen
2. API_Manager confirms printing is done
3. Main requests to read inserted data from API_Manager
4. API_Manager iterates through the data and sets it
5. Service/Need/Report converts data to JSON
6. API_Manager requests an update entry to Main
7. Main confirms request is done
Expected Result: Data is updated successfully, and Main confirms the update

Title: Fail to update data due to invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in but provided invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Main requests to print data to screen
2. API_Manager confirms printing is done
3. Main requests to read inserted data from API_Manager
4. API_Manager iterates through the data and sets it
5. Service/Need/Report detects invalid data and sends an error back to API_Manager
6. API_Manager informs Main of the failure
Expected Result: Data update fails, and Main receives an error message

Title: Start configuration successfully
Preconditions: System is initialized
Test Steps:
1. Configuration starts
2. Configuration downloads report
3. Configuration shows notification
4. Configuration sends notification
Expected Result: Configuration is started successfully, and all operations are completed without errors

Title: Fail to start configuration due to invalid API key
Preconditions: System is initialized but API key is invalid
Test Steps:
1. Configuration starts
2. Configuration attempts to download report but fails due to invalid API key
3. Configuration shows error notification
4. Configuration sends error notification
Expected Result: Configuration fails to start, and error notifications are shown and sent

Title: Show notification successfully
Preconditions: System is initialized
Test Steps:
1. NotificationSystem starts
2. NotificationSystem downloads report
3. NotificationSystem shows notification
4. NotificationSystem sends notification
Expected Result: Notification is shown and sent successfully

Title: Fail to show notification due to missing report
Preconditions: System is initialized but report is missing
Test Steps:
1. NotificationSystem starts
2. NotificationSystem attempts to download report but fails due to missing report
3. NotificationSystem shows error notification
4. NotificationSystem sends error notification
Expected Result: Notification fails to show, and error notifications are shown and sent

Title: Sign up user successfully
Preconditions: System is initialized

2. Server returns success message
Expected Result: User is signed up successfully, and a success message is returned

Title: Fail to sign up user due to existing email

Test Steps:
1. Server signs up user
2. Server checks if email exists
3. Server returns error message
Expected Result: User sign-up fails, and an error message is returned

Title: Send request successfully
Preconditions: System is initialized
Test Steps:
1. API_Manager sends request
2. API_Manager receives response
3. API_Manager returns response to caller
Expected Result: Request is sent successfully, and a successful response is received and returned

Preconditions: System is initialized but URL is invalid
Test Steps:

2. API_Manager receives error response
3. API_Manager returns error response to caller
Expected Result: Request fails, and an error response is received and returned
